title: Crown Quest Modpack
description: This is the official Fabric modpack for the Crown Quest Event.
body:
# As announced on May 13th, 2025, Crown Quest as officially ended, with no plans of coming back. Unless any announcement are made, this modpack will be archived to follow Crown Quest's current state. If the event were to come back, then updates may be made. - The Crown Quest Staff


# This is the official Crown Quest Fabric modpack

### It is made to have the mandatory mods for the event as well as some optimisation mods to make the gameplay better !

The event is currently in 1.20.2 so the modpack also is, but if the server gets updated to a newer version, the modpack will follow it.

Current mods : 

- Cloth Config API
- Dynamic FPS
- Edgeless Chat Screen
- Entity Culling
- Exordium
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Ferrite Core
- ImmediatelyFast
- Krypton
- LambDynamicLights
- LazyDFU
- Lithium
- Memory Leak Fix
- Mod Menu
- ModernFix
- More Chat History
- More Culling
- Noxesium
- Starlight (Fabric)
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
- Zoomify


*THESE MODS ARE NEEDED TO PLAY IN CROWN QUEST, MAKE SURE TO HAVE THEM ON YOUR CLIENT IF YOU ARE **NOT** USING THIS MODPACK

**Disclaimer that the icon is property of Crown Quest and can not be used for any other artwork, or a part of online content unless the content/artwork is directly about Crown Quest.**
